summary: Backend-only testing complete for iteration 109 data_prevista feature. All 8 pytest tests passed. Verified: (1) POST /api/commesse/{cid}/produzione/init calculates data_prevista from commessa deadline, (2) Phase init without deadline creates data_prevista=null, (3) PUT /api/commesse/{cid}/produzione/{fase_tipo} accepts data_prevista field in FaseUpdate, (4) GET /api/dashboard/semaforo includes fasi_in_ritardo count, (5) Semaforo logic correctly bumps green→yellow when phases are late. Fixed missing timedelta import in commessa_ops.py.

init_produzione_with_deadline.details: Creates 6 phases with data_prevista auto-calculated from deadline, dates are sequential

init_produzione_without_deadline.details: Creates phases with data_prevista=null when no deadline set

update_fase_data_prevista.details: FaseUpdate model accepts data_prevista field, persists correctly

semaforo_fasi_in_ritardo.details: Response includes fasi_in_ritardo count per commessa

semaforo_yellow_for_late_phases.details: Commessa with deadline 90 days away correctly bumps to yellow when phases are late

completed_phases_not_late.details: Completed phases with past data_prevista are not counted as late

seed_data_creation: Created test commesse for each test (with/without deadlines), all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: The data_prevista feature for production phases is working correctly. Key code locations: (1) routes/commessa_ops.py:823-864 init_produzione calculates data_prevista based on deadline, (2) routes/commessa_ops.py:874-881 FaseUpdate model has data_prevista field, (3) routes/commessa_ops.py:884-918 update_fase persists data_prevista, (4) routes/dashboard.py:429-440 semaforo calculates fasi_in_ritardo by checking data_prevista against today, (5) routes/dashboard.py:460-462 bumps green→yellow if fasi_in_ritardo > 0.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Missing timedelta import in commessa_ops.py would have caused NameError when init_produzione is called with a commessa that has a deadline
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added timedelta to the datetime import on line 9
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 8 tests passed including init_produzione with deadline calculating data_prevista correctly
